Most recent: Thu May 14 DPS arrived May 15 at 7:38 AM PT but Gmail MCP get_thread returns no parseable body — Net/Gross/Guests/Orders/Labor% require manual check in Toast app or browser. (2) Sling May 16 daily report not yet arrived at 4 AM run time (sends ~7:01 AM PT). Most recent: Sling May 15 received: 10 scheduled employees, 10 shifts, 56.66 hours, 0 OT, 0 uncovered. Staff (May 15): Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook), Noel Nunez (Chef), Christine Vargas/Moe Danely/Fred De Leon (Bartenders), Daniel Rodriguez/Augustine Arroyo/James Hernadez/Bri Kelley (Servers), Cal Carter (Busser). (3) Reviews backlog: 7 unanswered. NEW La Connolly 5★ Google May 15 (1 day, top priority). Dympna Pettit 5★ Google May 14 now 2 days old. Deimos Somied 5★ now 6 days old. Lisa O'Brien now 35 days old. (4) Google Ads: 4 report emails received in last 48h (2 daily, 2 campaign performance). No disapprovals or auth errors flagged. Live scrape not refreshed at 4 AM run — dashboard shows last good snapshot from May 13 (May 12 data). (5) Yelp last 24h: only marketing newsletters, no customer inquiries or actionable items. Last good scrape May 13. (6) TripAdvisor: no new email in 24h — no ad performance report. (7) Reservations: today (Sat May 16): 17 guests across 3 bookings — Kayla Escobar 12:15 PM (11), Naseem Hyder 6:30 PM (4, Cherry Bomz fans, wants table near band), Joseph Estrada 7:00 PM (2). Tomorrow (Sun May 17): no bookings. (8) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
